title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
